tga.description: Treasury General Account - U.S. Treasury deposits held at Federal Reserve Banks (excluding reserve balances). Represents funds the Treasury maintains in its operational account at the Fed.
tga.notes: Free API but requires registration for API key. Data is in millions of dollars, not seasonally adjusted. Week average ending Wednesday. Source: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (H.4.1 Factors Affecting Reserve Balances).

wdi.description: World Development Indicators - comprehensive database of global development indicators covering over 1,600 indicators for 217 economies including GDP, population, poverty, health, education, trade, environment, and infrastructure
wdi.notes: WDI is a database/collection, not a single indicator. Users must specify individual indicator codes (e.g., NY.GDP.MKTP.CD for GDP, SP.POP.TOTL for population). API is completely free with no authentication required. Access to 16,000+ time series indicators. Data available through FRED as well with 7,379+ WDI-tagged series. Also accessible via R package 'WDI' and Python libraries.

vix.description: CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) - measures market expectation of near-term volatility conveyed by S&P 500 stock index option prices
vix.notes: Free API requires registration at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/docs/api/api_key.html for API key. Data available from January 2, 1990 to present. Updated daily. Source: Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE). Units: Index (Not Seasonally Adjusted).

unknown_xyz.description: This metric identifier does not exist in known public financial data sources
unknown_xyz.notes: The term 'unknown_xyz' appears to be a placeholder or test query rather than an actual financial metric. No matching series was found in FRED, World Bank, BLS, OECD, or IMF databases. If you have a specific financial metric in mind, please provide: (1) the actual metric name or description, (2) the type of data (e.g., interest rates, GDP, employment), (3) geographic scope (US, global, specific country), and (4) any known alternative names. This will allow for accurate identification of the correct data source and series ID.

pmi.description: Purchasing Managers' Index - A composite indicator measuring manufacturing sector activity based on new orders (30%), production (25%), employment (20%), supplier deliveries (15%), and inventories (10%). A reading above 50 indicates expansion, below 50 indicates contraction.
pmi.notes: ISM PMI data was removed from FRED in June 2016 and is no longer freely available via public APIs. The official ISM PMI requires subscription from ISM (https://www.ismworld.org) or paid data vendors (Bloomberg, Trading Economics, etc.). S&P Global Markit also publishes a US Manufacturing PMI, but this also requires subscription. Free alternatives: OECD CLI (Composite Leading Indicator) is available on FRED as USALOLITONOSTSAM, though this is a broader economic indicator and not specifically PMI.
pmi.mapping_rationale: Searched FRED for 'PMI Purchasing Managers Index series ID' and 'ISM Manufacturing PMI'. Found historical series NAPM (ISM Manufacturing PMI Composite Index) which redirected to https://news.research.stlouisfed.org/2016/06/institute-for-supply-management-data-to-be-removed-from-fred/ confirming all 22 ISM series were deleted from FRED on June 24, 2016. Searched for S&P Global Markit PMI on FRED - no free series found. Verified via WebFetch that USPMIMFG does not exist (404 error). Searched Trading Economics API - requires paid subscription. Conclusion: No public free API exists for ISM or S&P Global PMI data. Only paid sources available (ISM subscription, Bloomberg, Trading Economics).

ib_revenue_jpm.description: JPMorgan Chase investment banking revenue - includes Advisory, ECM, DCM fees from quarterly earnings supplements
ib_revenue_jpm.notes: Free PDF download. Earnings supplement contains detailed IB fee breakdown by segment. Released mid-January (Q4), mid-April (Q1), mid-July (Q2), mid-October (Q3).

ib_revenue_gs.description: Goldman Sachs investment banking revenue - includes Advisory, Underwriting (ECM/DCM) from quarterly earnings
ib_revenue_gs.notes: Free PDF download. Global Banking & Markets segment breakdown available. Released ~2 days after JPM earnings.

ib_revenue_bac.description: Bank of America investment banking revenue from quarterly earnings and SEC filings
ib_revenue_bac.notes: Free PDF/SEC filings. Global Banking segment includes IB fees.

ma_volume_dealogic.description: Global M&A deal volume and value - league tables, rankings by advisor, region, sector
ma_volume_dealogic.notes: Free summary reports available. Full data requires subscription. Covers M&A, ECM, DCM, Loans league tables.

ma_volume_lseg.description: M&A and investment banking league tables - deal volume, value, advisor rankings
ma_volume_lseg.notes: Free quarterly reports available. Industry standard league tables. 3.3M+ transactions since 1970s.

ma_analysis_bain.description: Annual M&A market analysis - deal value trends, megadeal activity, sector breakdown
ma_analysis_bain.notes: Free comprehensive reports with charts. Published early each year for prior year review.

ma_analysis_pwc.description: Global M&A industry trends and outlook reports
ma_analysis_pwc.notes: Free reports on M&A trends, outlook, and sector analysis.
